note: Capabilities a cited repo-vs-field benchmarking agent is expected to have. Drawn from the deep-research-agent field (gpt-researcher, storm, open_deep_research) and the grade-a-repo-against-a-rubric field (ossf/scorecard). Score the skill's SKILL.md against THIS list so coverage/tier stay comparable across runs. v2: parallel-fanout sharpened to parallel-comparator-fanout (workflow-layer concurrent comparator analysis) and marked met after the sota-scan-fanout Workflow was built and smoke-tested green.

capabilities.test: every claim tied to a real source; no-source-no-claim rule
deterministic action-first dashboard with fixed section order
search until two empty rounds, not a fixed count
score against a saved per-domain capability list
persist run to .sota/last-scan.json + diff against prior
exhaustive mode can fetch and analyze multiple comparators concurrently through a workflow layer
emit the capability matrix as structured JSON
